---
title: "ODEs with deSolve"
format:
  revealjs:
    toc: false
---

## 2026 core scope

This Day 3 module focuses on writing and solving ordinary differential equation
models in R.

## We will cover

- Representing a simple infectious disease model as a system of equations.
- Translating model equations into an R function.
- Solving the model with `deSolve`.
- Inspecting and plotting simulated epidemic trajectories.

## Out of scope for the 2026 core

Parameter optimization with `optim()` and ODE parameter fitting are not part of
the required 2026 Day 3 session.
